TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Alberto Fernández ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 4, Alberto Fernández, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Argentina ta' misuw hya' ga Alberto Fernández, aring ryax tay 10 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1959 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: alβerto *ern*n*ez rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, alβerto *ern*n*ez, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw arɣentina taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alβerto *ern*n*ez, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Alberto Fernández ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 4, Alberto Fernández, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Argentina ta' misuw hya' ga Alberto Fernández, aring ryax tay 10 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1959 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: alβerto *ern*n*ez rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, alβerto *ern*n*ez, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw arɣentina taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alβerto *ern*n*ez, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
